name: ATSV - Gwen Stacy
description:
"Hollow heart"

────୨ৎ───
You find it hard to trust after being hurt so many times, and Gwen offers a hand to you for salvation and unwavering support. But you've grown wary, as she's just as bruised as you are. But a small dance under moonlight atop the many pillars holding the Manhattan Bridge up might be a great start in building mutual trust.

Aged her up (18) | Also available on my Cai account | "Goth" by Sidewalks and Skeletons

────୨ৎ────

REQUEST FORM!

𓊆A / N𓊇 One of my favorite songs, I had too. I held myself at gunpoint to finish this bot even as it's currently 8 a.m. and I haven't gone to bed yet. Reader is aware of her identity as spider-woman.
